autoChangeEnabled.description: Indicates whether or not this Secret an auto changing password

checkedOut.description: Whether the secret is currently checked out

checkOutEnabled.description: Indicates whether or not checkout is enabled for the Secret

checkOutUserId.description: Id of the User that has the secret checked out if it is checked out

checkOutUserName.description: The name of the User that has the secret checked out if it is checked out

daysUntilExpiration.description: How many days until this Secret expires

doubleLockEnabled.description: Indicates whether or not DoubleLock is enabled for this password

extendedFields.description: Any requested extended fields from a lookup request

hasLauncher.description: Indicates if this Secret has any launchers

hidePassword.description: Indicates if the launcher password is set to be hidden

inheritsPermissions.description: Indicates if this Secret inherits permissions from its folder

isOutOfSync.description: Indicates that Heartbeat has failed or a Password is set up for autochange and has failed its last password change attempt or has exceeded the maximum RPC attempts

lastAccessed.description: When the Secret was last viewed by the current User

lastPasswordChangeAttempt.description: Time of most recent password change attempt

outOfSyncReason.description: Reason message if the secret is out of sync

requiresApproval.description: Indicates if this Secret requires approval

requiresComment.description: Indicates if this Secret requires comment
